tutorials.title: Section 3: Validation and Publish
tutorials.description: Use this section for review readiness, pull request checks, Self Quality Assurance, publishing, and timeline expectations.

tutorials.title: Lab 7: Quality Assurance checks and steps
tutorials.description: Explains how to share previews, complete Self Quality Assurance, handle Quarterly Quality Assurance, and prepare the workshop for stakeholder review.

tutorials.title: Lab 8: Review, Quality Assurance, and publishing timelines
tutorials.description: Summarizes expected turnaround times for review, stakeholder Quality Assurance, publishing, and support follow-up.

tutorials.title: Lab 9: Pull Request automated checks
tutorials.description: Explains the automated checks that can block a pull request and how to interpret their output.

tutorials.title: Lab 10: Publish your workshop
tutorials.description: Walks authors through the final pull request and WMS publishing steps that move content into production.
